name: Tactical Deployment Frame
oracle_text: Alt-Mode (Assault Configuration) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 3/3 and it gains trample. Activate only as a sorcery.
flavor_text: Designed for rapid reassignment between logistical support and the frontlines of Cybertron.
design_notes: This card is an artifact that uses the Alt-Mode mechanic to transform from a utility object into a combatant. Since it is not inherently a creature, applying power and toughness via Alt-Mode effectively turns it into a creature for the duration of the effect (following standard MTG rules where artifacts with P/T become creatures). The 'TDFC' note in the prompt suggests a multi-mode capability (Tactical Defense / Flight / Combat); as a common, this card provides just one of those configurations (Assault/Combat) to keep complexity low and maintain the 'one idea per card' rule. While CMC 4 is high for a common, it serves as a building block for artifact-heavy archetypes.
